label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which book Dave ends up with. So, there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. The problem is about tracking the swaps they make over the semester. First, let me note down the initial books each person has: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, the swaps happen in a sequence of five steps. Let me go through each step one by one and track the changes. 1. **Claire and Bob swap books.** - Before swap: - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring - Bob has Ulysses - After swap: - Claire gets Ulysses - Bob gets The Fellowship of the Ring 2. **Claire and Dave swap books.** - Before swap: - Claire has Ulysses - Dave has Lolita - After swap: - Claire gets Lolita - Dave gets Ulysses 3. **Dave and Alice swap books.** - Before swap: - Dave has Ulysses - Alice has Moby Dick - After swap: - Dave gets Moby Dick - Alice gets Ulysses 4. **Dave and Bob swap books.** - Before swap: - Dave has Moby Dick - Bob has The Fellowship of the Ring - After swap: - Dave gets The Fellowship of the Ring - Bob gets Moby Dick 5. **Eve and Dave swap books.** - Before swap: - Eve has Catch-22 - Dave has The Fellowship of the Ring - After swap: - Eve gets The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave gets Catch-22 Wait, but let me make sure I didn't make a mistake here. Let me retrace each step carefully. Starting again with initial assignments. Initial State: - Alice: Moby Dick (MD) - Bob: Ulysses (U) - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring (F) - Dave: Lolita (L) - Eve: Catch-22 (C) 1. Claire and Bob swap: - Claire: U - Bob: F - Others remain the same. 2. Claire and Dave swap: - Claire: L (since Dave had Lolita) - Dave: U (since Claire now has Lolita, Dave takes the U from Claire) - Claire now has L, Dave has U. 3. Dave and Alice swap: - Dave had U, Alice had MD. - Now Dave has MD, Alice has U. 4. Dave and Bob swap: - Dave has MD, Bob has F. - After swap: Dave has F, Bob has MD. 5. Eve and Dave swap: - Eve has C, Dave has F. - After swap:
